document.docAuthor: Peng, Feng, Xie, Xiufeng, Peng, Zhengqiang, Wang, Xingmin & Chen, Xiaoshen
document.masterDocTitle: A taxonomic review of the genus Axinoscymnus Kamiya, with descriptions of three new species (Coleoptera, Coccinellidae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A taxonomic review of the genus Axinoscymnus Kamiya, with descriptions of three new species (Coleoptera, Coccinellidae)

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Key Laboratory of Bio-Pesticide Innovation and Application, Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510642, China. & Engineering Research Center of Biocontrol, Ministry of Education and Guangdong Province, Guangzhou 510640, China.

bibRefCitation.author: Ren, S. X. & Pang, X. F.
bibRefCitation.refString: Ren, S. X. & Pang, X. F. (1992) The Axinoscymnus Kamiya (Coleoptera: Coccinellidae) from China. Coccinella, 4, 20 - 23.

paragraph.treatmentCitationGroup:
Axinoscymnus navicularis Ren et Pang, 1992: 21
.—
Yu et Lau 2001: 153
,
Pang et al . 2004: 90
.

caption.paragraph:
FIGURE 10 .
Axinoscymnus navicularis Ren et Pang, 1992
: a–c female d–i male g–i holotype a, d, g dorsal view b, e, h lateral view c, f, i frontal view j abdomen k penis l tegmen, lateral view m tegmen, inner view. n labels of holotype. Scale bars: a–i: 0.5 mm, j: 0.1 mm, k–m: 0.05 mm.

subSubSection.paragraph:
Diagnosis. This species is closed to
A. nigripennis Kamiya
in external appearance and male genitalia but can be distinguished from the latter by the yellowish brown pronotum bearing a black longitudinal stripe at the central part (
Figs 10a, 10d, 10g
). In
A. nigripennis
, pronotum is yellowish brown without any maculae ( Fig. 12a ).

paragraph.materialsCitation:
Holotype :
Male , Fanjingshan , Guizhou ,
21. VII. 1990
, Ren SX leg ( SCAU , Fig. 10n ).

,

.
Distribution. China ( Guizhou , Yunnan , Xizang , Guangxi , Hunan , Hongkong ); Laos ; Nepal .

Remarks. This species is recorded from Laos and Nepal for the first time. We examined the holotype of this species, which is discolored and inconsistent with the original description in terms of body color.
